name: libnet-tftp-perl
title: libnet-tftp-perl
summary: Perl module for accessing TFTP servers
description:
Perl module for accessing TFTP servers
Net::TFTP is a class implementing a simple Trivial File Transfer
Protocol client in Perl as described in RFC1350. Net::TFTP also
supports the TFTP Option Extension (as described in RFC2347), with the
following options: RFC2348 Blocksize Option.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-tftp-perl because Perl module for accessing TFTP servers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-tftp-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-tftp-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-tftp-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
